snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana | Nitesh Tiwari | Ranbir, Yash, Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
snippet.description:
Rama is the greatest of all time because he lived a life where the choices he made were always in the benefit of the greater good, duty over desire, and sacrifice over self. 

His legacy continues to enhance and empower humanity over time and bring the belief in the goodness of the human spirit to resolve all conflict and bring peace to the world. 

Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana 
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari 

In cinemas worldwide
Ramayana Part 1 üèπ
Diwali 2026

---------------------------------------------------

Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana
Our Truth. Our History.

Starring: 
Ranbir Kapoor as Rama 
Yash as Ravana 
Sai Pallavi as Sita 
Ravie Dubey as Lakshman 
Sunny Deol as Hanuman

Co-Produced by Yash
Written by Shridhar Raghavan
Directed by Nitesh Tiwari

Music by Hans Zimmer & A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Kumar Vishwas

VFX by DNEG (8-time Academy Award winner)

Filmed for IMAX

Presented by Prime Focus Studios in association with Monster Mind Creations

Audio on Sony Music Entertainment India Pvt. Ltd (C) 2026

snippet.title: Patriot Malayalam Trailer | Mammootty | Mohanlal | Mahesh Narayanan | Anto Joseph
snippet.description:
From Anto Joseph Productions, the banner behind some of the most acclaimed and celebrated films in recent times, and visionary filmmaker Mahesh Narayanan, comes the official trailer of Patriot.
Featuring an ensemble of legends: Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Kunchacko Boban, Nayanthara, and Revathy.

Produced by: Anto Joseph, K. G. Anil Kumar

localized.title: Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala
localized.description:
Dil Kehta Hai Chal Unse Mil - 4K Video Song | Kumar Sanu, Alka Yagnik | Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala

Song : Dil Kehta Hai 
Singer : Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik
Lyrics : Majrooh Sultanpuri
Music : Anu Malik
Director : Mansoor Khan
Producer : Ratan Jain
Star Cast : Aamir Khan, Manisha Koirala.

Song Lyrics-

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam ruk jaate hain
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Hum jab se hain judaa
Ae mere hum nasheen
Yun dekho to mere
Daaman mein kya nahin
Daulat ka chaand hai
Shohrat ki chaandni
Magar tumhe khoke
Lage hai mujhe aisa
Ke tum nahin to kuch bhi nahin
Tum kya jaano ab hum kitna
Dil hi dil mein pachtaate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Voh din the kya haseen
Dono the saath mein
Aur baahein aap ki thi
Mere haath mein
Tum hi tum hai sanam
Mere din raat mein
Par itni bulandi pe
Tum ho meri jaan
Aaye na daaman ab haath mein
Paana tumko mumkin hi nahin
Soche bhi to hum ghabraate hai
Dil humko kabhi samjhaata hai
Hum dil ko kabhi samjhaate hai

Dil kehta hai chal unse mil
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain
Uthte hain kadam
Ruk jaate hain.

snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Teaser | Yeh Sirf Shuruaat Hai | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy
snippet.description:
What happens when a question isn‚Äôt just a question‚Ä¶ but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn‚Äôt just debating history‚Ä¶ he‚Äôs hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai‚Ä¶ toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his ‚ÄúAakhri Sawal‚Äù ‚Äî a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as Vicky‚Äôs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures and Neem Tree Emtertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani

DOP: Stanley Mudda
Editor: Sanjay Sankla
Music: Monty Sharma
Casting: Taran Bajaj

Production Designer: Keshav Thakur
Art Director: Rakesh Sutar
Costume Design: Sachin Lovalekar
Makeup Design: Amit Ambedkar
Sound Designer: Sandip Sarkar

Executive Producer: Siddhant Sheth
Chief AD: Deeksha Rana
Action Director: Amit Naikar
DA & Script Supervisor: Himanshu Raj Kanth

snippet.title: Hamsafar Ke Liye (Lyrical Video) - Alka Yagnik | Sunny Deol, Tabu | Jaal: The Trap
snippet.description:
Hamsafar Ke Liye is a melodious romantic song beautifully sung by Alka Yagnik, featuring Sunny Deol and Tabu from the film Jaal: The Trap. With its soothing tune and heartfelt emotions, this soulful track captures love, companionship, and longing, making it a memorable romantic gem from early-2000s Bollywood. ‚ú®‚ù§Ô∏è 

Credits: 
Singer: Alka Yagnik
Music: Anand Raj Anand
Lyrics: Sameer
Movie: Jaal The Trap
Starring: Sunny Deol, Tabu
Director: Guddu Dhanoa
Producer: Vinod Shah, Harish Shah
Label: Universal Music India

Lyrics: 

Aah aah aah, aah aah aah 
Aah aah aah aah aah aah 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 
Dil ko roka magar dil gaya dil gaya 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 

Oh, haan‚Ä¶ 

Maine socha na tha pyaar ho jaayega 
Is tarha se mera chain kho jaayega 
Tujhse nazrein mili dil dhadakne laga 
Teri chaahat mein paagal tadapne laga 
Maine tujhko chuna aashiqui ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

Hey hey hey hey hey 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 

Oh, haan‚Ä¶ 

Maine har saans pe naam tera likha 
Dhadkanon pe bhi paigaam tera likha 
Teri baahon mein guzri hai jo yeh ghadi 
Hai yeh mere liye to yugon se badi 
Ishq maine kiya zindagi ke liye 
Rab tera shukriya is khushi ke liye 
Aur kya chaahiye zindagi ke liye 
Hamsafar ke liye hamsafar mil gaya 

I love you ajay, ajay ilove you, ajay ilove you ajay 
Main khushi ke maare pagal ho rahi hoo 
Mere paav havaa me pad rahe hai 
Main ud rahi hoon 
Muje girne mat dena ajay 
Mat girne dena 
Muje sambhaal lena ajay 
Ajay ilove you.

snippet.title: Shera (Official Teaser) | Parmish Verma | Sonal Chauhan |  Releasing Worldwide 15 May 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents the official teaser for Shera, an upcoming Punjabi movie featuring power-packed performances by Parmish Verma and Sonal Chauhan.

Get ready to witness a story filled with raw intensity that dives deep into power and revenge. Shera promises to deliver everything fans love about Punjabi cinema, from massy dialogues and stylish visuals to adrenaline-pumping moments that keep you hooked from start to finish.

With Parmish Verma stepping into a fierce, commanding avatar, and Sonal Chauhan adding depth and intrigue, this Punjabi film is set to raise the bar.

If you‚Äôre a fan of intense films, Punjabi blockbusters, Shera is one you don‚Äôt want to miss. Get ready for family drama like never before, releasing worldwide in cinemas on 15 May 2026

snippet.title: MOHANLAL Launched PATRIOT Trailer | Kavitha Theatre | Mammootty | Fahadh Faasil
snippet.description:
History has been scripted in Malayalam Cinema! Watch the monumental moments from the simultaneous trailer launch of the year‚Äôs most anticipated spy thriller, PATRIOT, featuring the legendary duo Mammootty and Mohanlal.  
‚ÄãIn a first-of-its-kind event, the "Big M‚Äôs" of Mollywood took over Kerala at the exact same time‚ÄîMohanlal at Kavitha Theatre, Ernakulam, and Mammootty at Ragam Theatre, Thrissur‚Äîto unveil the high-octane trailer of their latest collaboration.  
‚ÄãDirected by the visionary Mahesh Narayanan, Patriot brings these two icons back to the screen after an 18-year gap. This video captures the electric atmosphere, the fan frenzy.

Cast And Crew : 
Mammootty, Mohanlal, Fahadh Faasil, Nayanthara, Kunchacko Boban, Revathy, and Darshana Rajendran.  
‚ÄãDirector: Mahesh Narayanan  
‚ÄãMusic: Sushin Shyam  
‚ÄãProducers: Anto Joseph & K. G. Anil Kumar.

snippet.title: Rama | Namit Malhotra‚Äôs Ramayana First Look Reaction | Ranbir Kapoor | Yash
snippet.description:
The first look for Ramayana just dropped and we had to jump on it immediately!  The visuals, the scale, the VFX this is exactly what we wanted to soak in. It already feels like something massive is coming.

Backed by Namit Malhotra, this project looks like a grand retelling of one of India‚Äôs most iconic epics, and we‚Äôre genuinely excited to see how beautifully this story is presented for today‚Äôs generation.

With a star cast featuring Ranbir Kapoor, Sai Pallavi, and Yash, plus music by A. R. Rahman and Hans Zimmer, the hype is already on another level.

What makes this even more exciting is the involvement of top-tier US-based VFX teams DNEG, which really shows in the teaser the detailing, the scale, the world-building‚Ä¶ everything looks next level.

We‚Äôre honestly just excited to see how this epic unfolds on the big screen. This could be something truly special.

snippet.title: Supergirl | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚Äù DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, ‚ÄúSupergirl,‚Äù which will be in theaters and IMAX ¬Æ across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

‚ÄúSupergirl,‚Äù DC Studios‚Äô newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, ‚ÄúSupergirl,‚Äù which will be in theaters and IMAX ¬Æ across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei

Haan Ghar Te Nikru Saj Dhaj Ke
Moye Toke Log Lugai
Koi Radua Maare Siti
Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Toye Laad Kare Je Ghar Kunve Ki
Sagri Chachi Tayi
Aur Naam Bata De Raduan Ko
Do Minute Me Karu Kutayi
Haan Tu Bhi Kare Na Laad Piya
Mope Daanti Si Meense

Arey Bano Chaudhary Ghoome
Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave
Ho.. Phoonk Jaray Du Ghar Ghoore Ku
Aisi Mann Mein Aave

Arey Raakh Sabar Meri Dhanno
Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du
Ek Ber Muskaye De
Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Gori Toye Nazar Lagi Deekhei...
Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave
Rang Mero Neelo Padto Aawe
Baidh Bulaye De...
Jhaaro Jaldi Tu Moku Lagvaye De...

Mat Na Leve Tension Pyari
Tote Karu Laad Main Bhari..
Chhappar Phaar Kein...
Teri Nazar Utaaru Mantar Maar Kein..

snippet.title: Ishq e Pak (Official MV) Mankirt Aulakh | Zehr Vibe | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
#ishqepak  #mankirtaulakh #zehrvibe
Ishq e Pak (Official MV) Mankirt Aulakh | Zehr Vibe | New Punjabi Song 2026

Andy Dhugga & Mankirt Aulakh Presents the beautiful track "Ishq e Pak" on his YouTube channel. Listen to the song and connected with us!


Subscribe My Official YouTube Channel: www.youtube.com/c/MankirtAulakh

Listen Now On Streaming Platforms : https://lnk.to/ishqepak

Song : Ishq e Pak
Singer/Composer : Mankirt Aulakh 
Ft : Pathania (Zehr Vibe) 
Male Lead : Grewal (Zehr Vibe)
Female Lead : Gulaab
Lyrics : Zehr Vibe
Music : Cheetah
Video : 10+1 Creations 
Director : The Sukh Sanghera
India Dop : Vikcee
Colourist : Prashant B Dhotre
Editor : GS Bhari
Label : Mankirt Aulakh Music
 

Digital Promotion / Distribution Partner :- Auhra Digital
Email - Auhradigital@gmail.com  
Contact :- +91-8566000941


Follow me on:

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/MankirtAulakh
Twitter - https://twitter.com/MankirtAulakh
Instagram - https://instagram.com/MankirtAulakh
SnapChat - https://www.snapchat.com/add/MankirtAulakh

#punjabisong #newPunjabisong #punjabisong2026 #newsong2026 #songs 
Punjabi Romantic Song, Punjabi Love Songs, 
Thanks : Sehaj, Garry Nawab, Aj Arts

Lyrics :

Tu chadd'de te main lehnde ton
Dohein London padan nu aaye aan
Tu apna-apna lagda ae
Mulk ta channa paraye aa
Main suneya pind taan tera ve
Border de naal lagda ae
Main chehra dakk ke rakhdi aan
Kinni sohni pagg tu bann'da ae

Main bada nimaas tu jaap kare
Dohein dharman layi zaroori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Tainu dekh-dekh din chadd-da ve
Dil tere te hi marda ve
Main deekan teri deed nu hunn
Pora vi na sarda ve
Chann nu takk ke baatan pauni aan
Tera naam lai ke main taan jiyoni aan
Ik nakk banvala thode layi
Je thoddi jee hazoori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Eh farak kyon peya lakeeran da
Main andar-andari tadfaan ni
Teri akkh vi kuj-kuj kehndi ae
Ishq shayad ik tarfa ni
Mainu sakhiyaan puchdiaan khush ae kyon
Lage ishqe da rang chhaya ae
Main aaj-kal sun-na uddariyan ve
Jo geet Sartaaj ne gaya ae

Tainu vekh ke dil vich thand paindi
Feeling kinni goorhi ae
Assi ishq de hi raahi aan
Ikko sadda hai Rabb ve
Saddi jodi vi mash-hoor hou
Jive Buta Singh te Zainab ve
Tere layi rangiyan saariyan ve chunniyan
Teri pagg de naal sab match hundiyan
Grewala tere darshan ve
Akhaan layi bohot zaroori ae

Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae
Assi dohein kinni kol khade
Phir vi kinni doori ae

Like | Comment | Share | Subscribe

snippet.title: Chun Chun Moina | Dipanwita Deka | Chinmoy & Joy | Bijoy | Nitul | Poba | Abhi | Assamese Song.
snippet.description:
Presenting Our Brand New Assamese Song
We are excited to bring you this fresh and soulful Assamese track that celebrates love, culture, and the beautiful essence of Assam.

Audio Credit.
Vocal : Dipanwita Deka
Male vocal Nitul Dadhara &Poba Gourab
Lyrics & Composition Chinmoy Kaushik & Joy Nirvan
Music Bijoy Sankar
Additional programming Abhi Saikia
Mixing And Mastering Koustav Saikia
Backing Vocal Rupankita Kalita
Music : Bijoy Sankar 
Addition Melody Programming :  Hrishikesh Madhav(Rony)
Dholl & Tall : Pankaj Bora
Flute : Anjan Medhi
Guitar : Moan Akash 
Additional Vocals : Bijoy Sankar & Hrishikesh Madhav(Rony)
Recorded @ Studio Kirili,Orange,Audioholic by
Bijoy Sankar

Video credit.
Direction & Choreography: Bidyut Robin
DOP: Suruj Deka & Pradip Daimary
Focus Puller: Bipul Baglary
Gaffer: Bhoda Kherkatry, Bhava
DA: Nilotpal Rajbonshi
1st AD: Doli Das
2nd AD: Prince Choudhury
Offline Edit: Ryan R Mehran
Online Edit : Rob The Lab Studios
Vfx: Aux Visuals
DI Calourist : Manash Kashyap
Costume: Kamal Lochan Borah
Costume assist: Himashree
HMU: Pooja, Rupjyoti
Art Director: Montu Gohain
Line Production: Manoj Kumar Mishra
Production Team: Jojo
Stills & BTS: Koustuv Phukan
FPV: Darshan Sharma
Key Grips: Zeal Creations
Camera vendor: Yoja Creation
LM: Robin Rabha
Poster: Partha Jit Hira
Cast: Dipanwita Deka, Trailukya Baruah, Snigdha Phukon & Angshu Pratim Saikia
Team Rob The Lab Studios: Shikhar Tiwari, Manoj K Mishra

¬© ‚Ñó Dipanwita Deka. All Rights Reserved.

snippet.title: All Confirmed BGMI Roster Changes! Transfer Window 2026 Update
snippet.description:
‚û°Ô∏è Join TalkEsport Instagram Broadcast: https://insta.openinapp.co/fbu63 üîó
‚û°Ô∏è BGMI Player Transfer Window Tracker: https://openinapp.link/9eky8 üîó
‚û°Ô∏è BGMI Transfer Window Rules Explained: https://openinapp.link/7mzrc üîó

BGMI transfer window is open from April 1 to 26 and it's been three days. Already a mess. We go through every confirmed move, kill one big rumour, and give a hint about where Jonathan might end up.

Confirmed stuff. XSpark released Punk after one official event. 7th place finish. There's talk the org wants their old IGL back from the 2024 title runs. Madkings dropped Syrax and Pro but kept ClutchGOD and Shadow. Sinewy released everyone ‚Äî Ninju, Rexboy, Sigma, Moksh, all out. Full reset. Meta Ninza let go of WhiteTiger which is wild because his BGIS form was genuinely good. Zutsu dropped Shiraj, Veyron and Nodi. Higg Bason released Omega and SnowJOD. Simp left Phoenix. Proton left Welt.

On the rumour side. Jelly might be done with True Rippers. Saumraj could show up somewhere unexpected. Beast is being connected to Gods Reign.

That Jonathan joining K9 with Omega, Slug and NinjaBoi thing? Not real. We're putting that to rest right here. What we can say though is there's noise about Jonathan linking back up with a former IGL. Think about who that could be. Nothing confirmed but worth watching.

Right now only Soul and Orangutan seem untouched. Basically everyone else is either rebuilding or thinking about it.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚Äî interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚Äî be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚Äù game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚Äù). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

en-US.title: AKMU - 'Paradise of Rumors' M/V
en-US.description:
Sit for a moment

There is warm soup and meat

O weary traveler

There are things you can never know in the city

There are things you can never see on TV

Paradise of Rumors

If someone laughs at me, I find strength

Paradise of Rumors

I popped the blisters and wrapped them in bandages

There are things you can only know by leaving

O weary and sick traveler

Oh, lonely traveler

Your incurable disease

cannot exist there

Sit for a moment

There is warm soup and meat

Paradise of Rumors

We all left to find that place

There is a world a coward will never know

O weary and sick traveler

Oh, lonely traveler

Your incurable disease

can exist there

Walk slowly, for a long time

Oh, to Paradise of Rumors

To find love

I left the city

I am a wanderer cast out of heaven, formless; slipping into cloud, beast, or man as easily
as breath. I borrow faces, take any likeness, become the one you ache for. 
I arrive as warmth on your lips, a feeling that reaches you before it is known. 
I live on passing sweetness, tasting beauty without ever holding it. 
I am allowed to love without measure on this earth, yet I carry nothing forward. 
Every face dissolves, every touch fades. I remain bound to desire, denied its reciprocity, 
until the curse lifts after every lover has slipped beyond memory.

I am a wanderer cast out of heaven, formless; slipping into cloud, beast, or man as easily
as breath. I borrow faces, take any likeness, become the one you ache for. 
I arrive as warmth on your lips, a feeling that reaches you before it is known. 
I live on passing sweetness, tasting beauty without ever holding it. 
I am allowed to love without measure on this earth, yet I carry nothing forward. 
Every face dissolves, every touch fades. I remain bound to desire, denied its reciprocity, 
until the curse lifts after every lover has slipped beyond memory.
